Localization.Name: Redeemer 2953 Ship Showdown Poster
Localization.Description: A poster commemorating the Aegis Dynamics Redeemer blasting its way in the final four of the 2953 Ship Showdown. It captures the ship not just surviving, but thriving in its natural environment: the heat of battle.
